svg.title: CHI Ecosystem — engineering metrics
svg.desc: CHI Ecosystem engineering pulse: 9 active repositories plus 75 archived, 3,339 releases, 21,143 commits in the last 12 months (peak 1,471 per week, including chi-archives history), 6,386 merged pull requests. CHI is the operating system for events — cashless payments, smart ticketing, crew management and real-time analytics for festivals and venues.
svg.text: Output vs headcount · fewer humans, more shipped
peak team 25 humans · now 6 + AI agents
